architecture.summary: React frontend (Vite) with SSE-based backend communication. ErrorCard, TestsPanel, SkillWorkspace components. WorkspaceContext manages state. sse.ts handles JSON serialization for server requests.

integrations.summary: N/A - pure frontend bug fixes and error handling improvements. No new external integrations.

performance.summary: N/A - error handling fixes, no performance-sensitive changes.

edge-cases.summary: Circular JSON from MouseEvent in retry path, missing error category fallback to unknown, raw error display without formatting, unhandled React render crashes.
